remarks:
Stunning 3-Bedroom Condo in Upland Estates
Welcome to your dream home! Nestled in the highly sought-after community of Upland Estates, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath condominium is a perfect blend of comfort and style. With its modern updates and spacious layout, this condo is designed for both relaxation and entertaining.

Key Features:
Spacious Living Areas
Step inside to discover a bright and airy living space adorned with rehabbed flooring that flows seamlessly throughout. The open-concept design allows for effortless entertaining, while large windows invite natural light to fill the room.

Functional Kitchen
The heart of the home is the well-appointed kitchen, featuring updated appliances, ample cabinetry, and sleek countertops. Whether you're whipping up a quick breakfast or hosting a dinner party, this kitchen is sure to meet your needs.

Luxurious Bedrooms
Retreat to the generously sized bedrooms, each offering a peaceful sanctuary for rest and relaxation. The master suite boasts an en-suite bathroom, providing a private space to unwind after a long day.

Outdoor Living
Enjoy the California sunshine on your large front patio and yard, perfect for outdoor gatherings or simply soaking in the serene surroundings. The attached 2-car garage adds convenience and extra storage space.

Community Amenities
As part of the Upland Estates community, you'll have access to fantastic amenities, including tennis courts, a swimming pool, and a jacuzzi. The affordable HOA fee of just $375 per month covers water, trash, and sewer, making it easy to enjoy a low-maintenance lifestyle.

Prime Location
Conveniently located near freeways, shopping centers, and schools, this condo offers the perfect balance of tranquility and accessibility. Whether you're commuting to work or enjoying a day out, everything you need is just moments away.

Don’t Miss Out!
This stunning condo is a rare find and is sure to go quickly. Schedule your private showing today and take the first step toward making this beautiful space your new home!

remarks: Brigden Ranch Craftsman full of charm and warmth, ideally located on a serene, tree-lined street framed by the San Gabriel Mountains. This 4-bedroom, 2-bath home blends enduring character with thoughtful modern upgrades. An inviting covered front porch sets the tone, leading into a warm and welcoming living room featuring a classic brick fireplace, refinished oak hardwood floors, crown molding, and abundant natural light.  The floor plan flows seamlessly into a formal dining room with original built-ins and a remodeled gourmet kitchen showcasing white cabinetry, granite countertops, stainless-steel appliances, and a custom banquette. A private and extraordinary study off the living room, flooded with sunlight, creates the ideal home office.  The primary bedroom offers a walk-in closet and a beautifully updated bath with designer finishes. Three additional bright secondary bedrooms and a stylish guest bath with Carrera marble, an oversized jetted Whirlpool tub, modern shower complete the interior, and a whole-house fan provides efficient cooling for comfortable summer living throughout the home.  The rear covered patio features a built-in misting system that overlooks a lush, private, fenced backyard with citrus trees and mountain views, creating an ideal setting for both entertaining and relaxing. The property also offers abundant storage, a LifeSource water filtration system, and a flourishing vegetable garden. The rear garage provides approximately 450 sq. ft. of finished space with even more storage. Enjoy close proximity to Lavender & Honey, Millie's Cafe, Woon, Bacchus, Italian Deli Co., Bloomfield Creamery, Connal's, 786 Degrees Pizza, Deluxe 1717, and other local favorites, along with easy access to EF International Language Campus, Huntington Library, Old Town, South Lake Ave, Paseo, Rose Bowl, Hastings Ranch, and the 210/134 freeways. This special home is an eternal gem in a fantastic location, close to all that Pasadena has to offer.

remarks: Welcome to Racquet Club Cottages West (Garden Villas), a rare William F. Cody-designed 1-bedroom, 1-bath modernist residence offering architectural pedigree, total privacy, and true Palm Springs resort living in coveted Uptown Palm Springs. Unit #101 is a standalone model with no shared walls and no adjacent patio, featuring a 200+ sq ft private jasmine-lined garden patio designed for seamless indoor and outdoor living. Fully designer remodeled in 2025, this glass-walled post and beam home features a custom walnut kitchen with full slab dolomite counters, Fisher and Paykel appliances, and bespoke craftsmanship that honors and elevates the original design. The south-facing orientation frames San Jacinto Mountain views and bathes the interior in golden winter light, while the terrazzo-clad wet room style bath delivers spa-level luxury with custom millwork and a refined vanity. A built-in walnut bar, wardrobe, and patio-accessed closet provide exceptional storage, ideal for full-time living or a polished desert escape. Designed by Cody and completed in 1960, this Class 1 Historic District is prized for architectural purity and lush grounds by Phil Shipley and Dudley Trudgett, with sculpted pathways, reflective water features, and towering palms creating a secluded resort atmosphere. Featured in leading midcentury architecture books and publications, including Wallpaper and Atomic Ranch, and showcased on Modernism Week tours, the gated community includes a 9-foot deep pool and luxury spa, restored to its original 1960s design in 2022. Additional highlights include fee land ownership (you own the land), Mills Act eligibility for potential tax advantages, and 14-day short-term rental eligibility. The HOA includes water, trash, roof and exterior maintenance, full-time gardener, pool and spa, complimentary laundry, and upkeep of the community's streams and gardens. Just minutes from the Uptown Design District with cafes, galleries, boutiques, and dining, this is more than a home. It is a collectible piece of Palm Springs modernism, beautifully restored for today. Buyer to verify HOA rules, Mills Act status, and rental requirements and restrictions. Please schedule a private showing today.

remarks: Sometimes, when presenting a property to market, there are so many exceptional features that it's hard to know where to begin, and this renovation just completed in 2025 is a perfect example. In this case, every aspect of living and entertaining at home has been thoughtfully considered, with a design that not only embraces but becomes one with its natural surroundings. For starters, the site itself is breathtaking, a spectacular setting that elevates this L-shaped modern home above the desert floor, offering seemingly endless mountain views and dramatic city lights. The architecture is deeply connected to the landscape, seamlessly integrating with the rugged terrain that so profoundly inspired the principles of desert modernism. This is a home that doesn't just sit on the land, it belongs to it. Inside, the open floor plan is an architectural dream, featuring an "invisible" kitchen with a large island and a striking natural stone wall. The interiors create a tonal and textured atmosphere, seamlessly blending organic materials that bring warmth to the modern aesthetic. Every detail has been designed to honor the desert environment, from the earthy color palette to the strategic placement of glass that frames nature like artwork. A hidden butler's kitchen sits behind the great room, with a galley of counter space and storage leading to what may be the most incredible laundry/mudroom we've ever seen. The integration of style and function throughout the home is next-level. On the other side of the house, a long hallway connects three ensuite guest bedrooms, a spacious den/media room, a gym, an office, and a powder room. A spa-style bathroom, complete with a steam shower, serves both the gym and the pool. And at the very end of this wing? The crown jewel: the primary bedroom suite. Wrapped in glass with a see-through fireplace and perched dramatically on the edge of the mountain, this is unlike any bedroom experience in Palm Springs, one where you wake up immersed in the landscape itself. Brand-new Monumental doors and windows dissolve the boundary between indoors and out, leading to a sunken concrete seating area with a fire pit, a swimming pool with a raised infinity spa, and a built-in BBQ with a sink. The outdoor spaces feel like a natural extension of the home, reinforcing the seamless connection between architecture and environment. And did we mention the forever views? Owned solar and all-new systems provide a highly efficient approach to desert modernism. A two-car carport with electric charging stations further enhances the home's sustainability. Truly one of a kind, this dramatic hillside property is the ultimate expression of the Palm Springs experience where modern design and the raw beauty of the desert exist in perfect harmony.

remarks: An Unparalleled Hollywood Hills Retreat. Experience the rare opportunity to own a private compound on a 12,000+ sq ft street-to-street lot in Lake Hollywood. This reimagined 1930s Art Deco Modern estate blends timeless architecture with contemporary comfort. Beyond the grand entrance, a spiral staircase introduces a home framed by captivating views. The chef's kitchen is a showpiece with brand-new Thor appliances including a wine fridge, a custom microwave drawer, bespoke cabinetry, and ample prep space. The primary suite is a private sanctuary, with a coffee bar, patio for sunrise coffees or sunset toasts, sleek fireplace, spa-inspired bath with dual vanities, oversized shower, custom closet, and beauty station. Perfectly located near premier dining, shopping, entertainment, and freeway access, this estate offers both privacy and proximity. Welcome to a lifestyle defined by elegance and distinction.

remarks: Welcome to one of the few truly custom estates in The Signature Collection, North Upland’s premier development. Designed by acclaimed Orange County builder Doyle Barker of the Jeffrey Group, this exclusive enclave of luxury homes represents the pinnacle of his work—and this particular residence was the original model, setting the standard for all that followed. From the moment you enter through the gated entry way, you are welcome by a flower garden, and step through the impressive double doors, you're greeted by soaring 20-foot ceilings and a dramatic sense of nearly six thousand square feet of interior space. Gleaming marble floors flow through much of the lower level, enhancing the grandeur of the expansive foyer, which opens seamlessly to both the formal living and dining rooms. A standout feature of this estate is the remarkable library—complete with a rolling ladder that accesses the upper shelves, ideal for displaying books or cherished collectibles. This inspiring space also functions beautifully as a home office, perfect for Zoom meetings and remote work. For the culinary enthusiast, the gourmet kitchen is a dream come true. Outfitted with gas cooktops, dual ovens, and multiple dishwashers, it offers versatility and convenience for any level of chef. A cozy breakfast nook completes the space, ideal for casual dining. The luxurious primary suite is a private retreat, featuring a romantic fireplace, built-in wet bar, and a spa-like bath with a soaking tub for two. A dedicated sauna and fitness area offer the perfect setup for your personal wellness routine—all within the comfort of your own home. Step outside to a beautifully landscaped backyard oasis, complete with a sparkling pool and spa, lots fruit trees around the property, perfect for entertaining and unwinding in total privacy. Centrally located between the 10 and 210 freeways, this home offers convenient access to top-rated schools, shopping, and all essential amenities. This is more than just a home—it’s a vacation resort style of living, and an opportunity not to be missed.

remarks: Gorgeous single-story 4.53-acre estate with breathtaking views! Upgrades shine throughout this private 4,350 sqft home with dramatic ceilings and open floor plan in the highly sought-after neighborhood of Hialeah Rancho Estates. Retreat to your outdoor dining area and glass viewing gazebo with a cozy fireplace, surrounded by majestic landscapes and the peaceful countryside. Entertain friends and family and enjoy a glass of wine while admiring the sweeping panoramic views. Picture-perfect sunsets from nearly every room in this elegant home! Watch horses run and play in the distance while you sip your morning coffee amidst your grove of 100 mature avocado trees, and breathe in the cool ocean breeze from the San Luis Rey River Valley. One wing of this estate includes two guest bedrooms, each with a private entrance, kitchenette, and upgraded en suite bath—perfect for guests or multigenerational living! Your dream horse property awaits with a detached 1,000 sqft barn featuring three horse stalls and a tack room, easily convertible to a large garage, workshop, or additional guest home. Owned solar with 40 panels! A pebble stone-gated entry leads to your spacious home featuring expansive windows flooded with natural light, gorgeous travertine, marble, Brazilian Cherry wood, tall baseboards, and custom wood beams. The original owners spared no expense building this estate with five fireplaces, custom built-ins, and high-end finishes, this home is stunning inside and out! The chef’s kitchen is a masterpiece: open and bright, with a farmhouse sink overlooking tranquil views for days, granite countertops with a porcelain artisan backsplash, built-in Sub-Zero refrigerator, Viking and Bosch stainless steel appliances, and a butler’s pantry. The breakfast nook and dining room make you feel like royalty! Gorgeous hardware, luxury Venetian chandeliers, custom window coverings, plantation shutters. As you walk through the flowing floor plan, you’ll find beautiful bathrooms, spacious secondary bedrooms and office, and custom built-ins. Even the laundry room is exquisite with granite countertops, ample storage for crafts or hobbies, and potential to be converted into an additional bedroom. The primary retreat features a marble Jacuzzi spa, dual marble vanity, fireplace, expansive walk-in closet, and a sitting area that opens to the spacious backyard. Outside, you’ll find courtyards and sitting areas, a built-in BBQ, water features, and manicured tropical landscaping throughout the residence. There is ample room for whatever you can dream of. An infinity pool overlooking mountain views as far as the eye can see is waiting to be built! The usable land has room to imagine a vineyard, garden, pool, or pickleball court. A four-car garage with converted workshop is ready for all your toys. Roses and trees of all varieties including avocado, orange, apple, fig, grapefruit, lemon, lime, and persimmon adorn the well cared for grounds. You’ll love this beautiful move-in-ready home in a wonderful location! One of only 19 custom-designed homes in Hialeah Rancho Estates. This home is situated on a private and serene road with endless views overlooking the prestigious Moody Creek Farms and San Luis Rey Downs Equestrian Centers. Bonsall is known for its calm lifestyle, natural surroundings, and exceptional weather, just 30 minutes to beaches and wineries. The Bonsall marketplace offers five-star restaurants, a cinema, and Daniels grocery store. Enjoy privacy and space while still being close to top-rated schools and shopping! Additional highlights include: three AC zones, tankless water heater, solid Alder wood doors, water filtration system, epoxy garage, screendoors, central vacuum, designer stonework, recessed lighting, arched doorways, decorative iron gate, security cameras, RV drain and electric hookups, wet bar with gold chiseled sink and Viking wine cooler, retractable sun awning, and surround sound.

remarks: Welcome home to this stylish and elegant home in the guard-gated community of The Ridge in the heart of Calabasas. Situated near the end of a cul-de-sac, this extensively renovated home has been updated to the highest standards - with no expense spared - and is perfectly designed to enjoy indoor-outdoor living at its best. As you enter the two-story foyer, you'll notice the gorgeous large slab limestone floors, an abundance of natural light, and beautifully appointed formal living and dining rooms on either side.  Just beyond, the spacious family room with fireplace looks out over the entertainer's backyard and flows into the show-stopping chef’s kitchen, featuring striking Calcutta Borghini marble counters and center island, Wolf appliances, custom solid flat sawn white oak cabinetry, and Zellige tiles.  The lower level also includes an office overlooking the backyard, a bedroom with en-suite bath, and a fabulous powder room with a backlit onyx sink. The beautiful limestone extends upstairs, with 10" wide European white oak wood flooring covering the remainder of the residence. Once upstairs, you find a generous loft/family room and a balcony with sweeping views. The private primary suite boasts stunning views, a two-sided fireplace, and a luxurious spa-like bath with a soaking tub, large walk-in shower, and dual custom closets - all crafted with timeless, high-end materials. The refined details extend to the secondary bathrooms, where you'll also find solid white oak cabinets, hand-made and cut terra cotta and marble flooring, Zellige tiles, and premium fixtures. The backyard oasis features a pool and spa framed by beautiful hedges and includes a fire-pit, a bbq area with a pizza oven, a cozy dining area, and lush, sophisticated landscaping - perfect for both relaxing and entertaining. Finally, this home is outfitted with a tankless water heater, premium audio, and a comprehensive video security system.

remarks: *** GORGOUS VIEWS *** Breath-taking views with of everything that the City of Angels known for. This upcoming area is the epitome of what families long for. Welcome to 3216 Altura Walk- a charming single-family home nestled in the historic hillside neighborhood of Lincoln Heights in Los Angeles. Built in the early 20th century, this home offers an elevated setting above the street level typical of Altura Walk properties — giving residents a sense of privacy and hillside character that’s rare so close to the city core. Perched in the hills above Lincoln Heights, homes on Altura Walk benefit from expansive outlooks over Los Angeles (similar nearby properties in the area can capture panoramic city views and sunsets over the hills). Due to the hillside topography, many residences enjoy more open sightlines than typical flat lots in the neighborhood — particularly views toward Downtown LA and surrounding hillsides to the north and west. The elevated placement also offers a feeling of being above some of the denser, street-level development below, while still being just minutes from urban amenities. Enoy bar-b-qs and gatherings while on your very own patio deck with a view of skyrise buildings of Los Angeles and the famous Hollywood sign. Minutes from Dodger Stadium and city attractions. This gem has a perfect flow from the patio deck to the kitchen, to the living room and family room, with multiple views from just about every living area. From a family of generations ready to pass this home to another family to make it their own. Come by and take a tour. See you here =)

remarks:
RARE BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY IN HISTORIC DOWNTOWN MARIPOSA Mariposa County is home to the world-renowned
Yosemite National Park, and this exceptional café and restaurant offers an incredible opportunity in the last stop town before
Yosemite’s main Arch Rock entrance. Originally built as the Dairy Dell Diner in the 1940s, then later the beloved Sugarpine
Restaurant, this charming and historic property is ideally situated directly on Highway 140, the all-weather route to Yosemite
that winds along the scenic Merced River. Most recently operating as the Happy Goat Farm to Table Restaurant, the property
has been recently upgraded with over $200,000 in improvements (completed in 2024). These upgrades include a COMPLETELY
REFURBISHED and updated walk-in refrigerator/freezer, all new floors, custom shelving, ice machine, hand sink, cooling
equipment, all new lights, sound system, CO2 system, complete interior update including rehabbing and updating all the
booths and seating and the entire building was brought up to code. All to seamlessly blend the building’s nostalgic character with a modern aesthetic. The restaurant can seat up to 55 patrons and features booths, a staff bathroom and seperate public
bathroom, tables, and a classic counter with stools that retain its timeless diner charm. Happy Goat is expanding operations
and moving to a new building so this building is now for sale. Perfect for a restaurant entrepreneur who wants a turnkey
restaurant with a captive tourist audience. The Happy Goat has quickly become a local favorite and a must-stop for visitors,
offering fresh, locally sourced breakfast and lunch. While breakfast and lunch have long been the tradition at this location,
dinner service presents a strong additional income opportunity. Located in historic downtown Mariposa, the last lodging
community before Yosemite’s main gate, the area benefits from year-round tourism and is home to hotels, shops, and
attractions such as the California State Mineral Exhibit and the Mariposa Museum, which celebrates the region’s rich Gold Rush
history. Completely renovated in 2008 and upgraded again in 2024, this turnkey opportunity includes the Building and Equipment. On- and off-street parking available.

Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the living spaces with natural light and treetop views of the surrounding hills. The main level features a grand living room with a magnificent Murano glass chandelier, a functional fireplace, a massive family room with an adjacent crocodile leather imprint walled powder room, and a formal dining room. Upstairs, the primary suite offers automatic shades along with blackout curtains, a TV that elegantly descends from the ceiling, as well as a walk-in closet with built-in walls. A spa-like en-suite bathroom adjoins with exquisite Bisazza tilework which cascades from light to dark as you walk through the room, plus a spa bathtub, steam shower and an in-wall Ariston espresso maker. The outdoor space includes a heated spa and pool with outdoor entertaining areas and a viewing deck that offers panoramic views from the top of the hill behind the home connected by a charming staircase. Three guest bedrooms, one with an en-suite bath, provide ample accommodation, while the additional guest bedrooms share a bathroom complete with both a shower and a bathtub. Underneath, a versatile space awaits, with a room equipped with a bathroom and shower which has easy access to the pool and can serve as a workout room or workplace. With meticulous attention to detail and modern conveniences throughout, this exceptional residence epitomizes luxury living in a serene oasis.

remarks: Welcome to your stunning, turn-key home in the exclusive, gated Aerie community of Park Niguel, located in the coastal-breeze enclave of Laguna Niguel! Nestled on a cul-de-sac, this beautifully updated two-story home blends modern design with serene surroundings and offers breathtaking territorial views of this master-planned “city of trees.” A short stroll brings you to top-tier Crown Valley Park and the Niguel Botanical Preserve, the “Crown Jewel” of Laguna Niguel, featuring sports fields, active community spaces, and the YMCA. Across from the driveway, you're steps away from the community pool/spa provide added convenience for relaxation and entertaining. Just seven minutes away, you can enjoy world-class South Orange County beaches. This gorgeous home features 3 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, a full 2-car garage w/ ample driveway parking, a privately landscaped patio oasis with an above-ground jacuzzi and outdoor shower. Step through newly upgraded double doors into the inviting living room with wood floors and a cozy gas stone fireplace with beach-themed driftwood logs. The fully renovated kitchen impresses with Calacatta countertops and backsplash, abundant cabinetry, stainless steel appliances including a 6-burner stove, wine cooler, LED lighting, and a breakfast bar. The adjacent atrium offers outdoor seating and a fire pit—perfect for a quiet moment or casual entertaining. A half bath and separate laundry room complete the first floor. Upstairs are all 3 bedrooms and a full bath, including the bright primary suite with vaulted ceilings, cedar-lined closets, and an ensuite bath featuring a walk-in shower and oversized double-sink vanity with makeup area. Step onto the newly replaced Trex balcony to enjoy sunny, elevated views overlooking the patio garden—an ideal morning retreat. Additional highlights include reverse-osmosis water filtration, full potassium water softener system that cleans the pipes, Ring doorbells, and an HVAC system rarely needed thanks to refreshing ocean breezes. Park Niguel offers privacy, security, and lovely amenities such as the nearby pool/spa. The location is exceptional—walking distance to parks, top schools, golf, shopping, dining, and entertainment, with easy access to Pacific Coast Highway and major freeways. This master-planned community’s preserved outdoor spaces ensure a pristine, highly livable environment for years to come. Move in and start enjoying one of Southern California’s most desirable areas—Laguna Niguel!

remarks:
Set on an oversized 14,715 sq ft lot across from the historic grounds of Lakeside Golf Club, this single-story Traditional sits on one of the most sought-after streets in the San Fernando Valley, long valued for its privacy, scale, and quiet sense of prestige.

The home unfolds through a series of generous, light-filled rooms that prioritize flow, comfort, and separation of space. Vaulted, wood-beamed ceilings and multiple fireplaces lend warmth and scale to the main living areas, while French doors throughout reinforce a seamless relationship between interior rooms and the outdoors. The layout allows for both gathering and retreat, with a distinct primary suite positioned separately from the secondary living spaces, offering privacy and a calm sense of removal.

The kitchen has been designed with longevity and functionality in mind, featuring a Miele dishwasher, a Sub-Zero refrigerator, Bosch double ovens, a built-in coffee station, and a breakfast nook complemented by a wet bar and beverage refrigerator. Bathrooms have been updated with stone surfaces and pedestal tubs, maintaining a restrained material palette that respects the home’s original character while providing modern comfort.

Outside is where the property truly comes to life. Mature trees, refreshed landscaping, and winding garden paths create a private, park-like setting, anchored by a recently updated heated pool that’s ideal for everyday use or entertaining. A separate office or gym with its own entrance adds flexibility for work or creative space, and a two-car attached garage provides everyday convenience.

With its oversized lot, private outdoor oasis, and it’s position along Valley Spring Lane, the property presents an opportunity to enjoy immediately while also offering meaningful potential for future expansion or reimagining—allowing a new steward to build upon a timeless setting in one of Toluca Lake’s most enduring residential pockets.

remarks: A charming Spanish Colonial hacienda tucked away on a corner lot in the Franklin Hills of Los Feliz. Wraparound front gardens and a walled courtyard - anchored by towering cacti, mature plantings, and a Jacaranda - frame the home's low-slung architecture: classic archways, a red Spanish tile roofline, and a turreted foyer. Inside, the living room is pure romance, showcasing garden views and crowned by a wood-vaulted ceiling. Original details shine: a decorative fireplace, vintage sconces, and built-in niches. Refinished hardwood floors and original wood windows carry the home's character throughout. A formal dining room with a wrought-iron chandelier flows into the original vintage-tiled kitchen. Off the kitchen, a sunny breakfast room - ideal as a home office - opens to the courtyard through French doors. Three well proportioned bedrooms enjoy abundant natural light and hillside views, including vistas of the Griffith Observatory. Two bedrooms offer direct access to the rear deck - an inviting and private place to unwind. A hall bath with tub and separate shower, laundry area, and a  en-suite bath complete the home's 1,588sf floor plan. Below the home is a substantial garage plus extra storage. Uniquely positioned on a gentle corner with over 90 feet of frontage, the home sits on its own promontory above the street. Close to daily essentials like Baller Hardware and Gelson's, the shops and dining of Los Feliz Village, John Marshall High School, Lycee International, and Franklin Hills' newest coffee and wine spot, Reunion & Co.

remarks: Welcome to Stirling City! This quiet little mountain town with all of its charm has grown so much over the years, with its own Museum, Fire Department and thriving culture of family life in the beautiful Butte mountains.  This has become the town to be in when Halloween comes around.  Fun filled rides with the kids and a comrnodery that makes living here so special!  This Cabin has a history going back to 1916 and the start of this quaint logging town. Throughout the generations it has been upgraded and remodeled and has become a wonderful home to raise a family in, retire and just enjoy the outdoors life or start fresh in ones own adventure. The Home is move in ready and boast of Starlink satellite "military" style  internet with WiFi 6 Orbi routers (up to 220 mbits down, 15 mbits up) allowing you to work from home, do on line interactive gaming and video.  The network is hard wired and coax in both bedrooms and upstairs office. Also, two cellular signal boosters, name brand WeBoost, allowing full cell service at all times,  The owner has spared no cost in the upgrades of the home with 4 Mini-Splits Heating and AC throughout. (4 power heads) All new lighting with dimmers. 200 Amp electrical service. The kitchen has been fully remodeled with all new cabinets, appliances, garbage disposal, electrical outlets and lets not forget to mention the all new 12x12 beautiful tile flooring that was reinforced with 3/4 OSB subfloor throughout to assure sturdiness and more over insulation to assure the home keeps the temp you desire. The home has two bathrooms; one with a walk in shower and the other with a deep soaking tub.  Step outside and note the fully fenced yard with an access area allowing for RV Parking.  The back yard has two sheds one large enough to be a garage with shelving already installed. The other shed is perfect size for a "He or She" Shed, crafting shed or even an outside office. A new 2500 gallon septic tank professionally installed. Wood stove ready with a nice teired tile hearth and outlet for piping. The yard is beautiful in the spring. There is a metal trellis with seating built in boasting of grape vine branches draping over.  You have got to see to appreciate all the touches. Make this beautiful Mountain Oasis yours today!

A standout upgrade is the complete roof replacement completed in 2025, including a full tear-off to the deck, new underlayment, flashing, vents, and upgraded Owens Corning shingles that exceed California energy-efficiency standards. Both the manufacturer and labor warranties transfer to the buyer, offering valuable peace of mind.
Inside, the home features smooth ceilings (popcorn removed), bright white interior paint to enhance natural light and help keep the home cooler in summer, recessed lighting throughout, and smart switches compatible with Google, Alexa, and Kasa. A dividing wall was removed and a large kitchen island added, creating an open-concept flow between the kitchen and living room. Laminate flooring replaces carpet in the main living areas and extra bedroom. LG smart front-loading gas washer and dryer are included. Exterior features include reflective paint, updated evaporative cooler pads, a fully fenced lot, room for RV or boat parking, and two storage sheds. Mature shade trees and open desert views create a quiet setting. The area is popular for off-road recreation and hosts the annual Wasteland Weekend nearby. A gazebo offers stunning sunset views, and minimal light pollution allows for exceptional stargazing. Convenient to Edwards Air Force Base and near the developing CoreCivic project in California City. ~Schedule a Showing today!~

remarks: Exceptional Arts District loft in the historic Barker Block, exquisitely designed by noted interior design firm DISC Interiors. A dramatic wall of windows spans the far end of the residence, dressed in floor-to-ceiling drapery that adds warmth and texture, filling the space with an abundance of natural light and framing a coveted downtown skyline view. West-facing units with all wood ceilings and sunset exposures like this rarely come to market at Barker Block, making this residence an exceptional opportunity.  This special home strikes a thoughtful balance of warmth and sophistication with hardwood floors throughout, nearly 11-foot ceilings with exposed beams, architectural lighting complemented by designer decorative fixtures, and custom built-in cabinetry providing ample storage at every turn for smart, elevated living. Warm white walls and painted-out ducting give the loft a more cohesive and softened feel. The heart of the loft is a chef's kitchen outfitted with top-of-the-line, recently updated appliances seamlessly anchoring the open layout, ideal for both everyday life and entertaining. A spacious full bath includes in-unit laundry, while the generously sized bedroom features luxurious custom curtains that provide privacy and a thoughtful separation of space. The bedroom is complemented by a large wall of custom designed closets with antique brass hardware, and a built-in wall-to-wall oak dresser.  A custom built-in 16' desk with a full wall of bookshelves thoughtfully separates the entry and dining areas, adding both function and architectural interest.The Barker Block is a full-service building offering 24/7 front desk and security, complimentary common-area WiFi, an outdoor lounge with fire pits, and a resort-style rooftop with heated pool, spa, BBQ areas, and a fitness center showcasing some of the best panoramic views in downtown Los Angeles. Known for its striking architectural details and timeless industrial character, the live/work designated Barker Block also offers a dynamic and sophisticated creative community spirit.Located in the heart of the Arts District, moments from Bavel, Girl and the Goat, Verve Coffee, Blue Bottle Coffee, as well as walking distance to Still Life Ceramic Studios, Dover Street Market, Bestia, Soho Warehouse, and art galleries such as Hauser & Wirth, this exceptional loft delivers a rare blend of architectural pedigree, thoughtful design, and a vibrant, walkable urban lifestyle.

remarks: Located in the gated community of Meadow Oaks in North Ranch, this 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom home offers comfort, convenience, and privacy. Tucked at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac with no neighbors directly across, the property spans 2,145 square feet. The sunlit living room features plantation shutters, while the den off the kitchen provides flexibility for a lounge or workspace. The kitchen is equipped with high-end appliances, a breakfast bar, and soft-close cabinetry, making it both functional and stylish. Upstairs, the primary suite includes vaulted ceilings, a private balcony with views of a grand oak tree, and plenty of space to unwind. Two additional bedrooms with hardwood floors can accommodate guests, family, or a home office. Outside, the fenced patio is ideal for outdoor dining or relaxing afternoons. The attached two-car garage offers an epoxy-finished floor and custom storage. This pet-friendly community is close to hiking trails, golf courses, boutique shops, and dining options. The Four Seasons Hotel Westlake Village is also nearby for those looking to enjoy luxury amenities. Thoughtfully designed for both comfort and practicality, this home is ready to welcome its next owner. (Some photos have been virtually staged.)

remarks: Welcome to 32986 Anasazi Drive, a refined contemporary home offering 4 bedrooms, a casita, spacious loft, flex space, and approx 3,428 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space. Privately situated on a cul-de-sac in the highly regarded Redhawk golf community, this impeccably updated, interior designer–curated home offers elevated finishes, a highly versatile floor plan, and serene views with no rear neighbors. A gated portico courtyard and custom wrought iron entry open to a grand foyer highlighted by a dramatic flared staircase and expansive living and dining spaces framed by wall-to-wall windows. The kitchen is designed for both form and function, featuring white cabinetry with crown molding, granite countertops, marble backsplash, an extended island, a walk-in pantry, newer appliances, a pot filler, a deep sink, and a custom-built-in bar with a refrigerator. The flexible layout includes a private-entry casita and a downstairs bedroom. Upstairs, the luxurious primary retreat offers a sitting area, separate vanity space, spa-inspired bath with a frameless marble shower, dual vanities, soaking tub, and an oversized walk-in closet with custom organizers. A generous loft presents the opportunity for a fifth bedroom, complemented by an additional flex space ideal for a study or reading area. The outdoor living space is framed by lush mature landscaping, creating a tranquil garden setting complemented by clean-lined concrete stepping stones, decorative river-rock hardscaping, a built-in Lion BBQ, and new vinyl fencing. Designed for entertaining and relaxation, the space blends natural beauty with modern, low-maintenance sophistication in a serene, private setting. Additional highlights include zoned HVAC, whole-house fan, water softener, automated kitchen blinds, designer lighting, and LVP water-resistant flooring upstairs. Just minutes from top-rated schools, Redhawk Golf Course, Old Town Temecula, Pechanga Resort, and renowned wineries, this exceptional home delivers privacy, elegance, and a lifestyle designed to be enjoyed.

remarks: Experience refined desert living in this beautifully remodeled and furnished condo within the beautiful Oasis Country Club. Perfectly situated for breathtaking panoramic views of the Santa Rosa, and San Jacinto Mountains. This home embodies sophisticated comfort and timeless design. The custom kitchen showcases pull-out shelving, a pull- out spice rack, and a vertical tray cabinet. The kitchen has quartz countertops with a waterfall edge, a designer tile backsplash, a Blanco sink, and new high-end faucet.The space is complemented with a great pantry with pull out shelving and soft-close cabinetry, and modern appliances, creating a kitchen that is as functional as it is beautiful. Both primary suites have been fully reimagined, featuring walk-in showers, new cabinetry, contemporary lighting, and elegant finishes that evoke a spa-like ambiance. The powder room has been converted into a convenient indoor laundry room, adding modern practicality without compromising style.The interior is enhanced by a striking stone gas fireplace, new baseboards, wood plantation shutters, ceiling fans throughout, and luxury vinyl plank flooring offering warmth and durability. The home is being offered furnished, including TVs, area rugs, and decor, along with surround sound for all incredible entertainment experience. Step outside to your east-facing patio and enjoy the serene beauty of the double fairways, ponds, and water fall along the 6th and 7th holes. Designed for outdoor enjoyment, the space features patio furniture and a gas barbecue, ideal for relaxing or entertaining under the desert sky. Additional upgrades include epoxy-finished garage flooring with built-in cabinetry, vanishing screen doors, outdoor lighting, and artificial turf in the courtyard for a polished, low-maintenance aesthetic. Residents of Oasis Country Club enjoy a resort lifestyle defined by community and comfort: a 60-par executive golf course, Ted Robinson-designed putting course, driving range, 22 lakes, 18 pools and spas, pickleball and tennis courts, a dog park, and both casual and fine dining options at the clubhouse and grill. This condo is the perfect harmony of luxury and livability--a place where every feature has been considered, and every view inspires. Truly a must-see home for the discerning buyer seeking a furnished retreat in one of the desert's most social and scenic communities.

remarks: Welcome to the exquisite top-floor corner unit boasts three bedrooms plus a versatile loft that can serve as a fourth bedroom, offering stunning sunset views. Located in a gated complex on the tranquil cul-de-sac of Playa Vista, this recently updated home exudes elegance and privacy. Upon entry, you are welcomed by the grand living spaces featuring cathedral ceilings, and expansive picture windows that flood the rooms with natural light and showcase serene northwest-facing views. Embrace the coveted Playa Vista lifestyle with access to parks, walking paths, premier shopping and dining, a weekly farmers market, The Resort pool and activity club, and close proximity to the Ballona Wetlands, Venice Beach, and Playa del Rey. Make this charming residence your own with the unmatched experience of living in Playa Vista.

remarks:
Welcome to 13942 Anderson St — a rare opportunity in Paramount! First time on the market in over 20 years, this trust sale gem sits on a desirable corner lot in a prime, well-established neighborhood. With 3 generously sized bedrooms and 1 bath across 876 sq ft of living space on a 3,275 sq ft lot, this home offers classic layout and solid bones, ready for your personal updates.

Step into an airy and bright living room that invites easy living and natural light. The spacious kitchen provides plenty of room for everyday cooking and gatherings, while a separate laundry room adds functional convenience rarely found in homes this age. Three large bedrooms offer flexible space for family, guests, or a home office. Thoughtfully built with handicap access, this property enhances comfort and ease for all.

The true standout is the amazing front yard — beautifully landscaped and featuring a charming orange tree, providing seasonal fruit and vibrant curb appeal. The corner location enhances visibility and brings a sense of space and presence rarely available in Paramount.

Located just minutes from major freeways including the I-105 and I-710, commuting and regional travel are a breeze — perfect for working professionals and easy access throughout Southern California.

Enjoy nearby parks and recreation, including Spane Park — a peaceful local green space perfect for picnics or leisure walks — as well as community favorites like Paramount Park with playgrounds, sports courts, picnic areas, and a pool. All American Park and Ralph C. Dills Park are also just a short drive away, offering additional outdoor activity options for families, pets, and active lifestyles.

Beyond parks, this home is near everyday conveniences, local eateries, shopping, and entertainment. The classic Paramount Drive-In Theatres and nearby recreation attractions provide fun weekend options just minutes away.

Perfect for first-time buyers, investors, or anyone looking to put their personal touch on a solid home with unbeatable value. Don’t miss your chance — this one won’t last long!

remarks: Discover the ultimate waterfront retreat, where luxury meets sustainability in this stunning estate designed for refined living. remarks: Experience luxury living in this tastefully renovated single level home that features 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, 1,485 square feet of living space on a 5,750 square foot lot with room for a pool. Upon arrival, the home's intentional landscape and well maintained exterior offers a preview of what you'll find past the front gate. The office's finished interior features dual-pane windows, engineered flooring, recessed lighting and a mini-split AC system that all combine to create an ideal work-from-home environment. Through the double door entry you are welcomed to an open floor plan where the designer kitchen is the centerpiece. Remodeled in 2022 the kitchen features stainless steel appliances, farmhouse sink, new cabinets with soft closing doors and drawers, a pantry and built-in desk off adjacent to the dining area. The kitchen island is well proportioned to the space and provides more storage with built-in cabinets, room to seat four, additional counter space and an aesthetically pleasing waterfall countertop. The open concept design is best illustrated by looking around when being near the kitchen sink; from there you can keep an eye on what's going on in the backyard, the dining area, family room, front courtyard and inside the office if the curtains are open. Step through the great room's sliding glass door to a sizable backyard with no neighbors behind, a West-northwest orientation perfect to enjoy sunsets and a pergola well suited for al-fresco dining. During 2022 the owners also replaced the water heater, AC condenser and air handling unit, installed engineered wood floors in the main living areas, carpet in the bedrooms, remodeled the hall bath and more - so be sure to check out the feature and upgrade list. With a low HOA, low tax rate, great schools nearby, only minutes from shopping, dining, parks, access to Lake Mission Viejo with all its amenities and being located within a fiberoptic cable service area, this home may jump to the top of your list. Come see it before it's gone!

remarks:
A spacious and inviting townhome offering room to live, relax, and enjoy everything Thousand Oaks has to offer.

The property offers just under 2,000 square feet of well-designed living space, providing room to spread out while still feeling comfortable and connected. High ceilings on both levels enhance the sense of openness, and a centrally located gas fireplace ties the living room and dining area together, adding warmth and character to both spaces.

The upper level contains all of the oversized bedrooms with vaulted ceilings, including a guest bedroom containing a large loft, which is ideal for a peaceful reading nook or storage. The openness and numerous windows create light-filled, inviting spaces throughout. The washer and dryer are conveniently located upstairs, making everyday living easier. A massive patio extends the living space outdoors and is ideal for relaxing, entertaining, or enjoying the open air. Downstairs, a private front yard area provides additional outdoor space rarely found in townhome living.

The home has been freshly painted and updated with new carpet, new blinds, and dual-pane energy-efficient windows, making it move-in ready. Additional features include a large attached two-car garage with secured automatic gated entry. The community offers a lovely pool, jacuzzi, and plenty of guest parking. The property is located just one block from Thousand Oaks Boulevard, offering easy access to many excellent restaurants, stores, parks, and the everyday perks that make this area so desirable.

The kitchen is a standout, featuring white soft-close cabinetry, granite countertops, custom tile backsplash, a large pantry, and a premium stainless steel KitchenAid appliance package. Sited against a gently sloping hillside, the home harmonizes with the natural contours of the surrounding trees and landscape. Sweeping views expand beyond the Equestrian Center to the rolling hills of the Santa Lucia Preserve. Within walking distance is the Hacienda, the gym and pool facilities at The Ranch Club and the community hub, The Nest. This timeless residence reflects a thoughtful dialogue between architecture, light, and landscape.

remarks: Welcome to a Modern Desert Masterpiece!  Set behind the prestigious guard gates of Monte Sereno, 3085 Arroyo Seco is a statement of refined modern living--where architecture, landscape, and light merge into a singular desert experience. Designed by acclaimed architect Anthony Poon, this rare contemporary villa captures the essence of Palm Springs glamour with expansive volumes and a seamless connection to its mountain surroundings.  Situated on an oversized, approximately one-third acre lot with no direct neighbors behind, the home embraces uninterrupted panoramic views of the San Jacinto Mountains - views that shift in color and drama from sunrise to sunset. Nearly floor-to-ceiling glass dissolves boundaries, allowing the desert's natural beauty to flow effortlessly indoors.  The great room, with its soaring ceilings and dramatic Fleetwood sliders, unfolds into a showstopping chef's kitchen crafted for both high-end entertaining and quiet evenings at home. Dual oversized islands anchor the space, complemented by Silestone Quartz surfaces, sleek Italian Modulo Cucine cabinetry, and a full suite of Miele appliances. Every detail reflects modern sophistication with a timeless sensibility.  The primary suite offers a private sanctuary of calm and light, featuring a spa-inspired bath with a free-standing soaking tub, walk-in shower, dual vessel sinks, and an expansive dressing room.  Outdoors, a covered terrace frames the sparkling pool and in-ground spa--an ideal setting for sun-drenched afternoons, golden-hour cocktails, and quiet desert nights under a canopy of stars. The home's orientation and lot placement create a rare sense of privacy and openness.  A separate +/- 318 Sq Ft guest casita provides luxurious accommodations for visitors, complete with its own bath, closet, mini-bar, dual entry doors, and dedicated HVAC. remarks:
Tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac and directly across from the prestigious Palos Verdes Golf Club, this beautifully updated home sits on an expansive 20,000+ square foot lot and offers commanding views of both the golf course and the Pacific Ocean from six private balconies. Bordering Malaga Cove / Palos Verdes Estates, the home boasts nearly 3,900 square feet of living space.

The property features a reverse floorplan that places the main living areas and primary suite on the upper level, perfect for enjoying the sweeping views, while the majority of the bedrooms are privately tucked below. Both levels offer a light filled layout with brand new LaCantina win-doors and windows that bring the outdoors in. The spacious living room, formal dining area, and open kitchen flow effortlessly to expansive view decks, ideal for entertaining. The kitchen is equipped with matte white Café appliances that combine high end design with professional grade performance. The upstairs primary suite features a fireplace, walk-in closet, and its own private balcony. A guest powder room completes the upper level

Downstairs, the home includes a second primary suite, ideal for guests or multigenerational living, plus two additional bedrooms that share a full bathroom. A large family and game room with a fireplace and built-in bar anchors the lower level, along with a dedicated laundry room and generous storage space perfect for a wine cellar or additional use.

This home has been extensively upgraded throughout, including all new PEX plumbing, complete electrical rewiring, dual zone HVAC with two new heaters, two air conditioning units, all new ducting, and designer air registers. A tankless gas water heater, new Toto bidet toilets, Brizo plumbing fixtures, and a Generac backup generator add comfort and convenience throughout. All renovations and upgrades were completed with proper city permits and approvals, ensuring quality, safety, and long term peace of mind.

The finished three car garage features vaulted ceilings, recessed lighting, and space for a car lift, while the wide driveway provides ample additional parking. The landscaped backyard includes mature fruit trees and space for a future garden or retreat.

With thoughtful updates, panoramic views, and a prime location, 5 Yellow Brick Road offers a rare opportunity to enjoy refined coastal living with comfort, style, and room to grow. Seller will consider offers with Buyer concessions.

remarks: Turnkey and fully furnished, this 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo at Coco Cabana blends thoughtful renovation with standout location. Featured during the 2025 Modernism Week Tour, Unit 16 offers one of the community's most desirable positions, boasting expansive mountain views from the back patio and living areas. Commercial-grade windows and sliders flood the space with natural light while offering exceptional sound and energy performance.The layout flows easily for daily living or entertaining, with defined living, dining, and kitchen spaces. Quartz countertops, custom cabinetry, and porcelain tile flooring create a cohesive, low-maintenance design throughout. remarks: Madison's Unrivaled Trophy Estate. Poised on the most coveted block of Ross Avenue, this monumental estate commands explosive views of pristine mountains and the emerald fairways of the club's signature Tom Fazio course. With an astounding 470 feet of golf course frontage, this property is a world unto itself, sprawling across a rare triple lot, encompassing approximately 2.5 entirely flat acres. Boasting 43,760 square feet built under roof and 35,370 square feet of climate-controlled space, it stands as the largest and most magnificent residence ever constructed in the Madison club widely regarded as the most exclusive and luxurious private club in the California desert. Originally conceived in 2020 as the personal primary residence of Madison's premier residential developer, no expense was spared in its creation. The estate features two breathtaking primary suites, each a sanctuary of approximately 5,000 square feet. The ground-floor suite offers immediate access to the lush grounds, while the secluded Penthouse Suite occupies the entire second floor, offering the ultimate private retreat. The home's fresh and stylish design is a seamless fusion of the finest materials, state-of-the-art technology, and masterful construction, serviced by five full kitchens. The design was driven by a single motto: "There is only one ride, and it better be fun." This philosophy is brought to life through an astonishing collection of amenities. Challenge guests at the area's only indoor pickleball court or on the professional outdoor court. Entertain in your private club affectionately known as "Da Club" complete with a full bar, DJ booth, and golf simulator. Rejuvenate in the world-class gym or at one of four shimmering glass-pebble pools. As evening falls, the estate transforms, with 32 distinct fire features (19 masonry fireplaces) casting a magical glow. A massive sound system and 40 televisions ensure the perfect ambiance is always just a touch away. For the automotive connoisseur, 13 garage spaces and 10 carport spaces await your beloved rides. After a day of excitement, your guests can retire to the spectacular guest house, a private haven with its own zero-edge pool. This estate is flawlessly equipped to host up to 26 guests, making it the ultimate destination for festival weekends, unforgettable holidays, or any celebration of life's most memorable moments. There is only one ride. This is it.

remarks:
Welcome to a home that doesn’t just impress — it captivates.

From the moment you arrive, you’ll feel it: this is truly one of a kind. Homes like this don’t come available often. Every inch has been thoughtfully designed, meticulously upgraded, and beautifully curated to create an experience — not just a place to live.

This modern, show-stopping residence is packed with premium features, including owned solar plus a prepaid solar lease, a powerful 26kW battery system, Tesla EV charger, tankless water heater, and a full PEX repipe — delivering next-level energy efficiency, comfort, and peace of mind. A 16-camera ADT security system ensures top-tier safety throughout the property.

Step inside to find sleek ceramic tile throughout, expansive living spaces, and three generously sized bedrooms, each designed as a private retreat. The spa-inspired bathrooms feel straight out of a luxury resort, featuring multi-shower heads, soaking tubs, and walk-in showers that invite you to unwind and recharge.

But the magic truly unfolds outdoors.

Your backyard is a private resort oasis, showcasing an oversized in-ground pool and jacuzzi built in 2023, a gazebo perfect for entertaining, and an oversized covered patio with breathtaking panoramic city-light views. As the sun sets, the atmosphere becomes unforgettable — perfect for hosting unforgettable gatherings or enjoying peaceful evenings under the stars. A convenient exterior guest bathroom makes poolside entertaining seamless.

Even the garage is elevated, complete with laminate flooring and a mini-split A/C and heating system, creating flexible space for a gym, studio, or luxury workspace.

This home screams entertainment, relaxation, and elevated living. It’s the kind of property that makes people linger… and fall in love.

You truly have to experience it in person — because once you arrive, you won’t want to leave. Trust me.

remarks: Tucked in the countryside just minutes from town, Roseanna Ranch is where modern comfort meets peaceful country living. This stunning 2.04-acre property has been lovingly renovated and designed for those who dream of wide-open spaces, horses in the pasture, and sunsets over the arena. The beautifully remodeled farmhouse spans approximately 2,100 sq. ft. with 4 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, offering the perfect blend of rustic charm and modern sophistication. Inside, Italian tile flows throughout the main living spaces, luxury vinyl plank flooring accents the bedrooms, and custom wood flooring adds character to the first floor. The spacious living room features a vaulted knotty pine ceiling with skylights that fill the home with natural light, while an efficient Heat Tech wood stove adds cozy ambiance. The kitchen is a showpiece with quartz/Cambria countertops, stainless steel appliances (new in 2019 & 2023), a garden bay window, and a dining room addition with skylights and built-in china cabinets. The primary suite includes a walk-in shower, a walk-in closet, and elegant finishes. Updates include new doors and windows, crown molding, a whole-house vacuum, fan, Culligan water softener, filtration system, and a new HVAC unit. Step outside and fall in love with the fully fenced and gated acreage, featuring manicured lawns, redwood, birch, crepe myrtle, and maple trees surrounded by colorful perennials and blooming roses. A solar-heated pool with a large patio area provides the perfect setting for entertaining, while raised garden beds and a fenced orchard offer a touch of farm-to-table living. For equestrian lovers, this property is a dream come true. The two-stall barn features paddocks, a tack room, hay storage, a large farm sink, a full bathroom with hot water, electric fans, and washer/dryer hookups. A 110’x120’ riding arena with sprinklers and excellent footing sits beside a half-acre pasture with irrigation and RV or trailer storage. There’s also a chicken coop, fenced garden, and space for tractors and equipment. A 12’x24’ detached studio with split HVAC, insulation, and electric is perfect as an art studio, office, or guest space. With 40 owned solar panels on the barn, a new well pump and casing (2023), and Byers LeafGuard gutters, this property offers beauty, efficiency, and peace of mind. Roseanna Ranch is more than a property; it’s a lifestyle of comfort, connection, and country charm just minutes from town and local schools.

remarks: Imagine waking to the soothing sound of waves and the ocean breeze drifting through your window. As the morning sun casts a golden shimmer on the water, you're invited to step outside and the soft sand welcoming. This isn't just a dream vacation it's your new reality in Huntington Beach's most coveted beachfront community. This beautifully remodeled 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom ocean-view condo is located in the exclusive, guard-gated Huntington Pacific Community offering a rare opportunity to own on the sand. Perched on the second floor with stunning coastal views, this 1,048-square-foot retreat has been thoughtfully upgraded to blend modern elegance with relaxed beachside living. Inside, you'll find quartz countertops, Italian cabinetry, premium Samsung appliances, in unit washer and dryer, updated plumbing fixtures, LED lighting, and newer flooring, all creating a clean, contemporary look. The exterior has been fully renovated with new stucco and a newer roof. remarks: Resting at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac in Emerald Bay—Orange County's premier private, guard-gated oceanfront enclave—this exceptionally rare oceanfront residence commands a singular oversized parcel with unobstructed surfline, cove, Catalina Island, and sunset views. The home is deliberately private, buffered from neighbors, and organized around dramatic, high-volume interiors that maximize the coastal panorama. A two-story entry sets the tone, leading to main living spaces on a single level: a great room, formal dining room, expansive family room or office, theater, and an oversized kitchen with oceanfront dining. All open seamlessly to a generous seaside terrace—one of the property's defining features.The terraced grounds descend toward the water's edge, featuring broad stone terraces, gardens, a seaside spa, and lawn; all anchored by nearly century-old Monterey cypress. The master suite occupies much of an entire floor, discreetly separated from secondary bedrooms, and enjoys amazing water vistas. An elevator serves all levels, with ample garage and off-street parking for residents and guests. A private gated path and staircase provide direct, exclusive access to the cove below—an uncommon privilege. Emerald Bay remains inimitable under current restrictions: a secure oceanfront community that enjoys nearly a half-mile of pristine private beach, parks, tennis courts, swimming facilities, volleyball, and other amenities in coveted North Laguna Beach. Its residents enjoy a lifestyle that is unmatched along the coast of Southern California. This is a rare opportunity to own a generously scaled oceanfront residence overlooking one of the world's most scenic coastlines.

remarks:
This beautiful 3-bedroom townhouse sits in the gated community of Spring Mountain Ranch. 

The main level offers an open living room & kitchen with a neutral color palette and big windows that fill the space with natural light. The large kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, Shaker cabinetry and an island with bar-top seating. The rest of the main level includes a powder room and a drop zone at the entrance of the attached garage. 

Head upstairs to find the bedrooms and the all-important 2nd-level laundry room. The primary bedroom boasts a walk-in closet the size of another bedroom and an ensuite with a dual vanity, a soaking tub and a glass shower. 

The two guest rooms share the cleverly-designed hallway bathroom, which includes double sinks and a separate shower/toilet room. The top level also has lots of built-in storage and beautiful mountain views. Don't forget about the solar roof panels, which help keep utility bills low. 

Nestled in the hills of Highgrove, the gated community of Spring Mountain Ranch offers amenities like a dog park and playground. This is truly a must-see home to fully understand all the endless possibilities it offers.

remarks:
Welcome to North Redondo Beach — one of the South Bay’s most desirable and conveniently located communities! Here you can enjoy the best of both worlds: the relaxed coastal lifestyle and easy city access. Just a few minutes from the ocean, award-winning schools, and neighborhood parks, this area is perfect for those who appreciate the South Bay way of living.
This 1-level, 3-bedroom home showcases thoughtful upgrades and meticulous attention to detail. Bathed in natural sunlight, and backing up to a neighborhood park,  this property is waiting for the most discerning buyer.  Recent improvements include new flooring, a remodeled kitchen and bathroom, recessed lighting, window moldings, new doors, stainless-steel appliances, and a stacked washer/dryer conveniently located inside the main house. The exterior has been freshly painted and features new landscaping and new iron gates that enhance both curb appeal and security. Every feature has been carefully selected to provide comfort, functionality, and modern style.
A fully finished garage with waterproof flooring and smooth drywall, providing the versatility to enjoy it as an additional living space.
Set on a large flat lot with mature fruit trees, the property offers endless possibilities. From creating your dream backyard with a pool, outdoor kitchen, or cabana, to adding an ADU, it's your opportunity for your inner designer to shine.   Enjoy the inviting extra-wide, covered patio, with recessed lights w/ dimmers and fans.
Commuters will love the quick freeway access, while still being close to gyms, markets, and top-rated schools. North Redondo is celebrated for its strong sense of community, family-friendly vibe, and exceptional value compared to neighboring beach cities — minutes away from the sand, surf, and sunsets.
Don’t miss this rare opportunity to own a turnkey home with room to grow in one of the South Bay’s most sought-after neighborhoods!

The primary suite is a true sanctuary with commanding valley views, a gas fireplace, walk-in closet, and a spa-inspired bath with dual sinks, a spa shower, and a jetted tub.

remarks: Make a smart move with this turnkey Duplex in the up-and-coming Wilmore district of Long Beach. Live in one unit and rent out the other to cut your mortgage payment in half and reap the benefits of becoming a new landlord or add an impressive R-4 property to your existing portfolio. Each unit comes with a two-car garage, as well as a tandem parking space off the alley. There are numerous upgrades, including a new roof, complete exterior stucco, dual-pane windows, keyless entry doors, two water heaters, fresh landscaping with a 6-foot white vinyl fence, exterior and interior painting, and three TCL brand mini-split systems per unit. Inside, you’ll enjoy vaulted ceilings, SPC oak floors by Republic, baseboards, modern chandeliers, and wall sconces. The back unit features high-end stainless-steel appliances and includes a washer and dryer, as well as a wall-mounted television. The kitchens boast Knotty Alderwood cabinetry, high-end Acacia butcher block counters, a 3D tile backsplash, a stainless-steel sink, dishwasher, microwave, and recessed lighting. Finally, the bathroom is outfitted with beautiful veinous Carrera marble and a floating vanity featuring an LED mirror with a built-in defogger. It makes sense to buy two completely renovated units, with the potential to add more, rather than being stuck with just one, as a home should always be considered an investment that holds the key to your future.

remarks: For those who demand exclusivity without the constraints of a country club, 2489 Tuscany Heights Drive offers a rare brand of desert living. This isn't the typical mid-century modern aesthetic seen throughout Palm Springs; rather, it is a grand Mediterranean estate that favors warmth, substance, and timeless architectural grace. This 3 Bedroom plus Bonus room and 4 Bath home is tucked away on a private, gated street, it serves as a secluded home for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated primary residence or a world-class seasonal retreat. The interior experience is defined by an incredible sense of volume. The ceilings are exceptionally high, creating an airy, palatial atmosphere that immediately sets the home apart. This vertical scale is balanced by massive, hand-hewn wood beams that crown the living spaces, grounding the grandeur with rich, organic textures. It is a home that feels substantial and permanent a warm, soulful alternative to the glass-and-steel minimalism found elsewhere in the valley. The estate was engineered to disappear into its surroundings. The transition from the vaulted great room to the outdoors is effortless, leading to a rear sanctuary that is perfect for entertaining or family gatherings. The backyard is a private resort carved from the desert itself. A custom saltwater pool and spa are framed by massive natural boulders, featuring a cascading rock waterfall that provides a serene acoustic backdrop. A fire pit integrated into the natural stone, an outdoor bar and a full summer kitchen, the home is a premier venue for hosting starlit gatherings. For out-of-state buyers or a second home, this is the quintessential "lock-and-leave" estate. You enjoy the security and prestige of an elite gated community without the mandatory membership or social obligations of a club. Here, you own the land, you own the view, and you own the silence. 2489 Tuscany Heights Drive is more than a residence; it is a private Mediterranean compound designed for those who value independence and architectural integrity above all else.

remarks: Wake up to soft west-facing light filtering through oversized windows, illuminating exposed brick walls and original timber beams as the city slowly comes to life below. This top-floor live/work loft at the historic Molino Lofts offers the authentic character only a converted 1920s warehouse can deliver open, airy, and effortlessly cool. Mornings begin with a walk to Verve or Blue Bottle for coffee, afternoons flow seamlessly between work, creativity, and living in the expansive open-concept space, and evenings are made for entertaining under soaring ceilings as the sun sets behind peek-a-boo DTLA skyline views. Whether you're hosting friends, creating, or running a business, the flexible live/work zoning allows the space to adapt to your lifestyle not the other way around.Step outside and you're immersed in the heart of the Arts District, surrounded by galleries, boutiques, and some of Los Angeles' most celebrated dining destinations, including Bestia, Bavel, and Girl & the Goat. This is a neighborhood defined by energy, culture, and walkability where every day feels inspired and connected. This isn't just a loft it's a way of living. Historic, creative, and vibrant, Molino Lofts offers a rare opportunity to live where art, architecture, and city life converge. Come experience what it feels like to call the Arts District home. 3D virtual tour: https://my.matterport.com/show/?m=ZH9hzR4TV43

remarks: Welcome to a cheerful and stylish 2-bedroom, 2-bath home with a versatile office/optional 3rd bedroom in the heart of Oceana, Oceanside’s active 55+ community! Here you’ll find not only a comfortable retreat, but also a vibrant lifestyle with access to a sparkling pool, clubhouse, lush gardens, dog park, art and lapidary studios, woodworking shop, billiards room, pickleball courts, boat/RV parking, a fully equipped weight room, and the lush Emerald Isle Golf Course winding through the neighborhood.  Step inside and discover a home designed for comfort, style, and easy living. Throughout the interior, honed ceramic tile flows seamlessly from room to room, complemented by fresh designer paint (2022), plantation shutters, updated vertical blinds, and energy-efficient double-paned windows and sliders. Ceiling fans in every room keep the spaces airy and inviting, while the office provides flexibility as a workspace, hobby room, or a possible guest bedroom. Each bedroom occupies its own quiet wing, offering direct courtyard access through sliding glass doors. The primary suite includes mirrored closet doors and a beautifully updated ensuite bath, while the guest bedroom is conveniently located near the second full bath and discreet laundry closet. The bathrooms shine with thoughtful upgrades—new cabinets, fixtures, and countertops—while the primary bath feels like a private spa with its marble shower and built-in teak bench. The kitchen is equally impressive, boasting a farmhouse sink, stylish new backsplash, refreshed countertops, and all-new appliances that make both cooking and entertaining a joy. At the heart of the home, a private atrium creates a true indoor/outdoor living experience, with every room enjoying direct access. Imagine morning coffee surrounded by greenery, tending to your herb garden, or dining al fresco under the stars in this serene and versatile space. Additional highlights include central air conditioning with a smart thermostat, an oversized one-car garage plus driveway parking, ample guest spaces, a roof updated in 2020, and even a front-row view of Oceanside’s Fourth of July fireworks—an annual celebration you can enjoy from the comfort of your own home. And when you’re ready to explore, you’ll find sandy beaches, golf courses, shopping, dining, and all the best of coastal living just minutes away. This home blends convenience and charm, making every day feel like a vacation.

remarks:
For the first time in 25 years, this well-loved Hidden Valley Lake home is ready for its next chapter. Situated in one of the most sought-after neighborhoods, this charming 3-bedroom, 2-bath residence blends comfort, nature, and untapped potential — offering the perfect foundation for your personal upgrades and future memories.

Inside, the home welcomes you with a functional layout and abundant natural light. A cozy pellet fireplace anchors the living room, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere ideal for relaxing or gathering. The primary suite features generous space, a jetted soaking tub, and the opportunity to redesign it into your own custom retreat. Throughout the home, original character remains lovingly preserved, providing solid structure and a blank canvas for modern enhancements.

Step outside to a peaceful backyard designed for rest, reflection, and connection with nature. Enjoy sweeping mountain views from the covered deck, listen to the soothing sounds of the koi pond, or pick fresh fruit from mature citrus and fruit trees. Additional perks include ample storage under the deck and home, plus possible space for RV, boat, or extra parking.

Living in Hidden Valley Lake comes with incredible benefits — from the serene 102-acre private lake with beaches and boat launches, to the championship golf course, tennis and pickleball courts, community pool, dog park, walking trails, and horse stables. It’s a lifestyle rooted in outdoor recreation, community amenities, and year-round enjoyment.

Whether you're a first-time buyer, an investor seeking upside potential, or someone looking for a peaceful retreat with room to grow, this property delivers comfort, character, and opportunity in one beautiful package.

remarks:
BACK ON THE MARKET!!!

Nestled inside the highly sought-after exclusive gated community of The Lakes, this beautifully upgraded home offers the perfect blend of modern elegance, comfort, and resort-style amenities.

Step inside to find an open-concept floor plan designed for both daily living and entertaining. The gourmet kitchen features granite countertops, a huge center island, stainless steel appliances, and an abundance of cabinetry—perfect for gathering with family and friends. The hardwood floors downstairs add warmth and sophistication, while plush carpeting upstairs ensures comfort in the private living spaces.

With 5 spacious bedrooms, plus a downstairs office, there’s room for everyone. The home offers 2 full bathrooms upstairs and a convenient half bath downstairs, making it as functional as it is stylish.

Outside, the sellers spared no expense—investing over $50,000 in backyard upgrades. Enjoy year-round outdoor living with low-maintenance artificial turf and AlumaWood patio covers, creating a private oasis ideal for relaxing evenings or weekend gatherings.

Residents enjoy access to kayaking, boating, and fishing, plus The Bay Club, a 20,000 sq. ft. facility offering: Two swimming pools, waterslides, spa & fitness center, Outdoor grill/patio with fireplace, Event center, reading room, and Wi-Fi lounge.

The Menifee Unified School District serves the community with nearby Southshore Elementary, Bell Mountain Middle, and Heritage High. Higher education is also within reach at Mt. San Jacinto College.

29106 Hidden Meadow Dr is more than a home—it’s a lifestyle upgrade. Don’t miss the chance to live in one of Menifee’s most desirable gated communities.

Call today to schedule your private tour!

PRIME LOCATION with EVERYDAY CONVENIENCE:
Minutes from top Costco, Target, Lowe’s, CVS, and Stater Bros, plus countless restaurants, coffee shops , and medical services. Enjoy easy access to the 14 Freeway, putting all of Santa Clarita—and greater Los Angeles—within reach.
Schedule your private showing today!

remarks: AQUACULTURE, SOLAR & MORE! Tiny Home was sold separately. House lost in CZU fire was passive solar home, w/ gardens & fruit trees. House had Solar heat & passive cooling: zero heating/cooling bills over life of house! Small wood stove for extra heat; 2nd well dug in '96 for irrig. & pond. The 2nd well is surface water & was used thru Spring. Pond is 30x80'+/- w/ 60 mil. EDPM liner & geo tech liner overlay for a natural look & to retain soil. 125 tons of river rock was placed over the liner and creek . Pond used to raise game fish, including 12 lb channel catfish, large mouth bass, bluegill, crayfish, minnows and mosquito fish. Santa Cruz Co. Fish and Game Dept. issued a stocking permit. Hatchery/concrete structures at end of pond for raising red swamp crayfish, minnows and mosquito fish. Anacharis plants from pond are placed in raceways for crayfish food and habitat. Pumps, timers, plumbing intact for wells, pond & hatchery. Also listed as raw land, MLS# ML81925559 without tiny home
