remarks:
Tucked at the end of a peaceful cul-de-sac, this beautifully maintained single-story home offers a rare blend of space, comfort, and quiet charm, where neighbors still wave and everyday life feels just a bit more relaxed. Set on nearly half an acre of flat, fully usable land, the property features 4 bedrooms plus a dedicated office, 3 bathrooms, and over 3,100 square feet designed for both connection and comfort. Inside, soaring ceilings create an airy feel, complemented by rich millwork, upgraded baseboards, and elegant quartzite flooring flowing through the main living areas. The remodeled kitchen anchors the home with an oversized island, crisp white cabinetry, quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a sun-filled breakfast nook, opening seamlessly to the family room with fireplace, ideal for gatherings both large and small.

The primary suite is a true retreat, featuring a coffered ceiling, direct backyard access, dual vanities, soaking tub, and walk-in closet. Secondary bedrooms are generously sized, including a private guest wing with a remodeled bathroom and walk-in shower. Thoughtful upgrades continue throughout, from wood flooring and custom carpeting to built-in cabinetry and storage in the three car garage.

Step outside to an entertainer’s backyard designed to be enjoyed year-round, with an expansive covered patio, built-in BBQ island with sink and refrigerator, and multiple seating areas shaded by mature trees. The grounds include ten producing fruit trees (lemon, lime, orange, pomegranate, grapefruit, and fig), along with fragrant rosemary and more than thirty additional trees planted for beauty and privacy. The manicured lot is ready to enjoy today, while still offering exceptional future potential with ample space for both a pool and an ADU. A large shed with electricity provides added storage or hobby space, and utilities are already in place for a spa or fire pit.

Just minutes from shopping and everyday conveniences, yet tucked into a setting that feels worlds away, this home delivers the best of both worlds. With leased solar for energy efficiency, a welcoming neighborhood atmosphere, and a layout that truly lives well, this property offers comfort, charm, and opportunity on a scale that’s increasingly hard to find.

remarks: Welcome to 2235 Stearns — a beautifully crafted stick-built home located in a desirable neighborhood off lower Pentz Road. Set on a generous .69-acre lot with mature trees and a welcoming circle driveway, this property offers peace, space, and incredible potential. With ample parking for RVs, boats, trailers, and all your extra vehicles, plus room for an ADU or a shop—and the ability to easily tie into the brand-new engineered septic system—this lot offers flexibility that’s hard to find. Inside, you'll find a warm and inviting layout highlighted by a vaulted ceiling in the living room that enhances the open-concept feel. The kitchen features gorgeous knotty alder cabinetry, quality finishes, and a spacious island perfect for entertaining or everyday living. The split floorplan places the primary suite on one side of the home for added privacy. This large bedroom includes a walk-in closet and a beautifully tiled walk-in shower. The laundry room is truly a standout—exceptionally spacious with extensive cabinetry and abundant storage. On the opposite wing, two additional bedrooms offer comfortable space for family, guests, or a home office. Step outside to the covered back patio, overlooking the wide, tranquil yard where several mature trees still remain. You’ll also enjoy a convenient drive to both Chico and Oroville, offering quick access to shopping, dining, and amenities. With quality construction, thoughtful features, and an oversized lot ready for your vision, 2235 Stearns offers the perfect blend of comfort, usability, and long-term potential. This is a home you won’t want to miss.

remarks: Don’t miss out on this absolutely gorgeous townhome located in the gated community of Iron Ridge in Portola Hills. This popular floorplan boasts a patio and two balconies, along with nearly 2,100 sqft of living space, and offers a host of amenities throughout. Highlights include a first floor bonus room with direct patio access and full bathroom that could easily be converted into an additional bedroom or utilized as an office or gym! The large gourmet kitchen is accented with Quartz countertops, a huge center island with breakfast bar, tons of storage cabinets, stainless steel appliances, and an adjacent dining area that overlooks the covered patio providing the perfect flow for entertaining family and friends! The spacious living room includes recessed lighting, and sliding glass doors that lead out to the front balcony. The third level features two large secondary bedrooms, along with the primary suite which is equipped with a ceiling fan, and oversized walk-in closet. The ensuite bathroom features dual vanity sinks, quartz counters, and a large shower with custom tile. The laundry room is also conveniently located on this floor. The direct garage access provides parking for two cars and includes a tankless water heater and whole home water filtration system to complete this beautifully upgraded home! The Iron Ridge Community offers its residents access to local sport fields, tennis courts, resort-style pool, multiple playgrounds, mini water park, jacuzzis, poolside cabanas, a large clubhouse to host events with kitchen and fireplace, perfect for large gatherings, dog parks, hiking trails and much, much more!  Right outside the gates, residents can also enjoy a large city park, with fabulous views, perfect for morning walks, evening strolls, a children’s playground, volleyball and pickleball courts. Residents have easy access to multiple commuter routes, including the 241 toll road. This community is also a short distance to local shopping at the Foothill Town Center and a great selection of restaurants.  All this plus no mello roos and a low tax rate!
